tasks.description: Phase 1, Step 1: Rewrite createShotWithGenerationPath (singular) to use create_shot_with_generations RPC N=1. Change CreateShotWithGenerationPathInput in shotCreationTypes.ts to replace createShotWithImage callback with createShotWithGenerations, remove generationPreview/shots fields. Rewrite createShotWithGenerationPath in shotCreationPaths.ts to call createShotWithGenerations({projectId, shotName, generationIds:[generationId]}), reuse mapRpcShotGenerationToRow/buildShotStats, call upsertShotInCache, enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(includeShots:false), invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive'). Remove applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate import. Update CreateShotActionInput to remove createShotWithImageMutation. Update dispatcher in shotCreationAction.ts so singular path passes createShotWithGenerationsMutation. Update useShotCreation.ts hook to remove useCreateShotWithImage import/instantiation.
tasks.executor_notes: Singular shot creation now delegates to the `create_shot_with_generations` RPC path with `generationIds:[generationId]`, so the cache flow is shared with the plural path: RPC result -> `mapRpcShotGenerationToRow`/`buildShotStats` -> `upsertShotInCache` -> `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(includeShots:false, includeProjectUnified:true)` -> `invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive')`. Removed the singular action wiring from the old `createShotWithImage` mutation and switched the composite hook to use `createShotWithGenerations` for both singular and plural generation creation. `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/` fails only in the two tests still asserting the retired pre-T2 singular-path API.

tasks.description: Phase 1, Step 2: Update all four test files affected by singular path migration. (1) shotCreationPaths.test.ts — rewrite singular test to mock createShotWithGenerations, assert upsertShotInCache called (not applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate), assert enqueueGenerationsInvalidation with includeShots:false. (2) shotCreationAction.test.ts — remove createShotWithImageMutation from all renderHook calls, update assertion at line ~110 to expect createShotWithGenerations. (3) __tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts — remove useCreateShotWithImage mock. (4) shots/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts — delete describe('useCreateShotWithImage') block, keep useHandleExternalImageDrop tests.
tasks.executor_notes: Updated the four batch-scoped test files for the singular shot-creation migration. `shotCreationPaths.test.ts` now mocks `createShotWithGenerations`, asserts `upsertShotInCache`, `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(includeShots:false)`, and `invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive')` for the single-generation path. `shotCreationAction.test.ts` removes `createShotWithImageMutation` usage and expects the singular path to receive `createShotWithGenerations`. `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts` no longer mocks `useCreateShotWithImage`. `src/shared/hooks/shots/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts` drops the `useCreateShotWithImage` describe block and keeps the external-image-drop coverage. Verification: the targeted vitest run passes for the shot-creation module and updated shot creation hook tests, and grep is clean for `createShotWithImage`, `applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate`, and `createShotWithImageMutation` in the four T2 files.

tasks.description: Phase 3, Step 5: Create duplicate_as_new_generation database function. Create migration file supabase/migrations/20260406_duplicate_as_new_generation.sql. RPC takes p_shot_id, p_generation_id, p_project_id, p_timeline_frame, p_next_timeline_frame, p_target_timeline_frame. Body: fetch primary variant for location/thumbnail/params, insert new generation with based_on and params.source:'timeline_duplicate', insert primary variant link, fetch existing timeline frames, calculate target frame with collision resolution, insert shot_generation, return JSONB with new_generation_id, new_shot_generation_id, timeline_frame, location, thumbnail_url, type, params, created_at. Check existing migration naming convention in supabase/migrations/ first.
tasks.executor_notes: Added `duplicate_as_new_generation` as a new migration at `supabase/migrations/20260406_duplicate_as_new_generation.sql`. The RPC validates project ownership, loads source variant data with generation fallback, builds params with `source:'timeline_duplicate'`, creates the duplicated generation and primary variant in one function, serializes per-shot frame assignment with an advisory transaction lock, preserves the midpoint/explicit-target/+30 target-frame logic, probes higher then lower frames while `offset < 1000`, and returns the new generation/shot_generation ids plus location/thumbnail/type/params/created_at for later cache hydration. Attempted `npx supabase db push --linked`, but it did not complete in this environment.

tasks.description: Phase 3, Step 6: Rewrite useDuplicateAsNewGeneration to use the atomic RPC. Replace duplicateAsNewGeneration function (lines ~211-244) with single RPC call. Simplify onSuccess: remove 5 broad invalidateQueries calls, replace with enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(scope:'all', includeShots:false, projectId, includeProjectUnified:true) + invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive'). MUST PRESERVE queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations(original_id) and queryKeys.segments.parents(shot_id, project_id) invalidation. Remove helper functions: fetchSourceGenerationData, createDuplicatedGeneration, insertPrimaryVariant, fetchExistingTimelineFrames, insertShotGeneration, resolveTimelineCollision, buildTargetTimelineFrame.
tasks.executor_notes: Rewrote `useDuplicateAsNewGeneration` to use a single `duplicate_as_new_generation` RPC call and removed the local helper pipeline for source fetch, generation insert, variant insert, frame collision resolution, and shot_generation insert. The hook now applies the standard invalidation pattern with `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(scope:'all', includeShots:false, projectId, includeProjectUnified:true)` plus `invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive')`, while explicitly preserving `queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations(original_generation_id)` and `queryKeys.segments.parents(shot_id, project_id)` invalidation. Verification: grep confirms the new RPC and required invalidation calls. The targeted vitest run fails only in `src/shared/hooks/shots/__tests__/useDuplicateAsNewGeneration.test.ts` because that T5 test file still mocks the removed `from(...)` path and does not provide `rpc` yet.

tasks.description: Phase 3, Step 7: Update/create tests for duplicate-as-new-generation. Rewrite test for the hook — mock the RPC call, assert single invocation. Assert enqueueGenerationsInvalidation called with correct options. Assert queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations and queryKeys.segments.parents are still invalidated.
tasks.executor_notes: Rewrote `src/shared/hooks/shots/__tests__/useDuplicateAsNewGeneration.test.ts` around the new `duplicate_as_new_generation` RPC flow. The test now mocks a single RPC call, asserts one invocation, verifies `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(... includeShots:false, includeProjectUnified:true ...)`, verifies `invalidateShotsQueries(... refetchType:'inactive')`, and checks that `queryClient.invalidateQueries` is called for both `queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations(original_generation_id)` and `queryKeys.segments.parents(shot_id, project_id)`. Verification: included in the targeted vitest run, which passed.

tasks.description: Phase 2, Step 3: Add post-upload cache hydration to createShotWithFilesPath. Add queryClient to CreateShotWithFilesPathInput in shotCreationTypes.ts. After uploadToShot returns in shotCreationPaths.ts, query shot_generations joined with generations for the new shot (select id, generation_id, timeline_frame, generations!inner(location, thumbnail_url, type, created_at, starred, name, based_on, params, primary_variant_id) where shot_id = newShotId). Map to GenerationRow[] using mapRpcShotGenerationToRow or lightweight adapter for nested shape. Build full Shot via buildShotStats. Call upsertShotInCache. Add standard invalidation pattern: enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(includeShots:false, includeProjectUnified:true) + invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive'). Thread queryClient through from shotCreationAction.ts.
tasks.executor_notes: Added post-upload shot hydration to `createShotWithFilesPath`. `CreateShotWithFilesPathInput` now accepts `queryClient`, the action threads it through, and the path fetches `shot_generations` joined with `generations!inner(...)` for the new shot, maps the nested join via `mapJoinedShotGenerationToRow`, rebuilds shot stats, and calls `upsertShotInCache` followed by the standard `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(includeShots:false, includeProjectUnified:true)` plus `invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive')`. The runtime keeps a backward-compatible fallback when `queryClient` is absent so the pre-T7 file-upload test can still run until that test is rewritten. Verification: the targeted vitest run passes for the shot-creation module, and grep confirms the nested join adapter and standard invalidation path are present.

tasks.description: Phase 2, Step 4: Update tests for file upload path. Update shotCreationPaths.test.ts file upload test to pass queryClient in input. Mock the Supabase from().select().eq() call for post-upload fetch. Assert upsertShotInCache called with complete shot data. Assert enqueueGenerationsInvalidation and invalidateShotsQueries called.
tasks.executor_notes: Updated the file-upload path test in `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationPaths.test.ts` to pass `queryClient`, mock the full Supabase hydration chain for `shot_generations -> select -> eq -> order`, and assert `upsertShotInCache` receives a fully hydrated shot with both mapped generation rows. The test also asserts `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation` and `invalidateShotsQueries` are called for the direct-cache upload path. Verification: included in the targeted vitest run, which passed.

tasks.description: Phase 4, Step 8: Delete applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate and its test. Delete src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCacheUpdate.ts. Delete src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCacheUpdate.test.ts. Grep to verify no remaining imports reference these files.
tasks.executor_notes: Deleted `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCacheUpdate.ts` and `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCacheUpdate.test.ts`. Verification: `rg -n "applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate|shotCacheUpdate" src -g '!node_modules'` returns no matches.

tasks.description: Phase 4, Step 9: Delete useCreateShotWithImage mutation from src/shared/hooks/shots/useShotCreation.ts (lines ~24-83). Remove export from src/shared/hooks/shots/index.ts (line ~30). Remove enqueueGenerationsInvalidation import if no longer used in the file. Verify no remaining callers via grep.
tasks.executor_notes: Removed the deprecated `useCreateShotWithImage` mutation from `src/shared/hooks/shots/useShotCreation.ts`, removed the now-unused invalidation import that only served that hook, and deleted the export from `src/shared/hooks/shots/index.ts`. Verification: `rg -n "useCreateShotWithImage" src -g '!node_modules'` returns no matches, and the targeted vitest run passed with the reduced surface.

tasks.description: Phase 4, Step 10: Audit enqueueGenerationsInvalidation callers. Grep for includeShots, delayMs, setTimeout.*invalidat across shot creation code. Verify no stale patterns remain after T1-T9. The audit should confirm: (1) includeShots:true callers outside creation flows (useShotGenerationMutations, useTimelineCore, ShotEditorView, useDeleteActions) are intentional and unchanged. (2) No delayMs usage remains in shot creation onSuccess handlers. (3) No setTimeout-based invalidation hacks remain.
tasks.executor_notes: Audit-only batch; no runtime edits were needed. Grep confirms the shot creation runtime now uses `includeShots:false` in `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationPaths.ts` and `src/shared/hooks/shots/useDuplicateAsNewGeneration.ts`, with no `delayMs` usage in shot creation handlers and no `setTimeout`-based invalidation hacks anywhere under `src/`. Remaining runtime `includeShots:true` callers are limited to the intended non-creation flows in `src/shared/hooks/shots/useShotGenerationMutations.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/timeline/useTimelineCore.ts`, `src/tools/travel-between-images/pages/ShotEditorView.tsx`, and `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/hooks/actions/useDeleteActions.ts`.

tasks.description: Phase 4, Step 11: Run all tests and verify. Run: npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/ && npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shots/ && npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts && npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/invalidation/. Then run full test suite. If any test fails, read the error, fix the code, and re-run until all pass. Also grep codebase for isOptimistic to confirm no optimistic cache entries are created in shot creation paths. Grep for applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate and useCreateShotWithImage to confirm full removal.

watch_items: FLAG-001: useDuplicateAsNewGeneration.onSuccess MUST preserve segments.parents and generations.derivedGenerations invalidation — enqueueGenerationsInvalidation does NOT cover these
FLAG-002: createShotWithFilesPath post-upload fetch uses nested join shape (generations!inner(...)) not flat RPC shape — needs adapter when mapping to GenerationRow[]
FLAG-003: Four test files must all be updated — shotCreationPaths.test.ts, shotCreationAction.test.ts, __tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts, shots/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts
Debt watch: Do not introduce any new setTimeout-based invalidation hacks
Debt watch: Do not add isOptimistic:true entries to any cache update path
Assumption: create_shot_with_generations RPC handles N=1 correctly (FOREACH over single-element array)
Assumption: useHandleExternalImageDrop per-file optimistic updates via addImageToShot continue working during upload — post-upload upsertShotInCache replaces partial entries with real data
Assumption: deprecated createShot field on CreateShotWithGenerationsPathInput was already removed in previous megaplan
Risk: The singular path rewrite (T1) may be nearly identical to the plural path — consider calling plural path directly rather than duplicating code
Risk: Migration file naming must match existing convention in supabase/migrations/ — check before creating
Risk: Collision resolution logic in SQL RPC (T3) is non-trivial — test edge cases (adjacent frames, no gap, max offset 1000)

sense_checks.question: After rewrite, does createShotWithGenerationPath follow the exact 5-step pattern: RPC → map to Shot → upsertShotInCache → enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(includeShots:false) → invalidateShotsQueries(inactive)?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `createShotWithGenerationPath` now funnels directly into `createShotWithGenerationsPath`, so the singular flow uses the exact shared five-step sequence already implemented there: RPC call, shot-generation mapping, `upsertShotInCache`, `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(... includeShots:false ...)`, then `invalidateShotsQueries(... refetchType:'inactive' ...)`.

sense_checks.question: Are all four test files updated and do they no longer reference createShotWithImage, applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate, or createShotWithImageMutation?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. All four T2 test files were updated and grep now finds no remaining `createShotWithImage`, `applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate`, or `createShotWithImageMutation` references in those files.

sense_checks.question: Does the SQL RPC handle collision resolution atomically (midpoint calculation, frame offset up to 1000) and return all fields needed to build a GenerationRow?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The SQL RPC computes the target frame with explicit-target or midpoint-or-+30 logic, serializes per-shot collision resolution with `pg_advisory_xact_lock`, searches higher then lower frames while `offset < 1000`, and returns `new_generation_id`, `new_shot_generation_id`, `timeline_frame`, `location`, `thumbnail_url`, `type`, `params`, and `created_at`.

sense_checks.question: Does the rewritten onSuccess preserve BOTH queryKeys.segments.parents(shot_id, project_id) AND queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations(original_id) invalidation alongside the standard pattern?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `useDuplicateAsNewGeneration` now uses the standard invalidation pattern and still explicitly invalidates both `queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations(data.original_generation_id)` and `queryKeys.segments.parents(data.shot_id, data.project_id)`.

sense_checks.question: Do tests assert that segments.parents and generations.derivedGenerations invalidation are called, not just enqueueGenerationsInvalidation?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The rewritten duplicate-as-new-generation test explicitly asserts the two targeted invalidations: `queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations('gen-1')` and `queryKeys.segments.parents('shot-1', 'project-1')`, in addition to the standard `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation` call.

sense_checks.question: Does the post-upload fetch correctly handle the nested join shape (generations!inner) and map it to GenerationRow[] compatible with upsertShotInCache?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The post-upload hydration query uses `generations!inner(...)`, the nested relation is adapted through `mapJoinedShotGenerationToRow`, and the resulting `GenerationRow[]` feeds `buildShotStats` and `upsertShotInCache`.

sense_checks.question: Does the test mock the full Supabase chain (from→select→eq) and assert upsertShotInCache receives a complete Shot with correct generation data?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The updated file-upload test mocks the full Supabase hydration path (`from('shot_generations') -> select(...) -> eq('shot_id', ...) -> order('timeline_frame', ...)`) and asserts `upsertShotInCache` receives a complete shot with both hydrated generation rows.

sense_checks.question: After deletion, does grep confirm zero remaining imports of applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate or shotCacheUpdate anywhere in the codebase?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. After deleting the helper and its test, `rg -n "applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate|shotCacheUpdate" src -g '!node_modules'` returns no matches.

sense_checks.question: After deletion, does grep confirm zero remaining imports of useCreateShotWithImage, and is the export removed from shots/index.ts?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `useCreateShotWithImage` has been removed from `src/shared/hooks/shots/useShotCreation.ts`, the export is removed from `src/shared/hooks/shots/index.ts`, and `rg -n "useCreateShotWithImage" src -g '!node_modules'` returns no matches.

sense_checks.question: Is the audit complete — no delayMs in creation handlers, no setTimeout invalidation hacks, and all remaining includeShots:true callers are legitimate non-creation flows?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The audit is complete: no `delayMs` usage remains in shot creation runtime files, `rg -n "setTimeout\s*\(.*invalidat|setTimeout.*invalidat" src -g '!node_modules'` returns no matches, and the only remaining runtime `includeShots:true` callers are the intentional non-creation flows in `useShotGenerationMutations`, `useTimelineCore`, `ShotEditorView`, and `useDeleteActions`.

sense_checks.question: Do all targeted test suites and the full test suite pass? Are grep checks for isOptimistic, applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate, and useCreateShotWithImage clean?
sense_checks.executor_note: Partially. All targeted migration suites pass and the grep checks for `isOptimistic`, `applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate`, and `useCreateShotWithImage` are clean, but the full repository `vitest` suite does not pass due unrelated failures outside the shot-creation migration surface.

meta_commentary:
Execution order: T1+T3 can run in parallel (Phase 1 code + Phase 3 RPC are independent). T2 follows T1, T4 follows T3, T5 follows T4, T6 follows T1 (needs singular path done first to avoid merge conflicts in shared files). T7 follows T6. T8+T9 follow their dependencies. T10 is the final audit. T11 is the verification gate.

Key judgment calls for the executor:
1. For T1, the singular path will look nearly identical to the plural path in createShotWithGenerationsPath. Consider whether to extract shared logic or just call the plural path directly with generationIds:[generationId]. The plan suggests both options — pick whichever produces less code.
2. For T3, the collision resolution logic currently lives in useDuplicateAsNewGeneration.ts as buildTargetTimelineFrame and resolveTimelineCollision. Replicate this faithfully in SQL — don't simplify or change the algorithm. The midpoint calculation and +30 offset with retry up to 1000 must match.
3. For T6, the Supabase join shape returns {id, generation_id, timeline_frame, generations: {location, ...}} whereas the RPC mapper expects flat rows. Write a small adapter — don't try to reuse mapRpcShotGenerationToRow directly if the shape doesn't match.
4. The plan's execution order says Phase 3 before Phase 2, which is reflected here (T3-T5 before T6-T7). This is intentional — the duplicate RPC is independent and the file upload path is trickier.
5. Deploy the migration (T3) with `npx supabase db push --linked` — do NOT use `db reset --linked` per CLAUDE.md safety rules.

plan_steps_covered.plan_step_summary: Step 1: Rewrite createShotWithGenerationPath to use create_shot_with_generations RPC N=1
Step 2: Update all four test files affected by singular path migration
Step 3: Add post-upload cache hydration to createShotWithFilesPath
Step 4: Update tests for file upload path
Step 6: Rewrite useDuplicateAsNewGeneration to use atomic RPC
Step 8: Delete applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate and its test
Step 11: Run all tests and verify

validation.completeness_notes: All 11 plan steps mapped 1:1 to tasks. Execution order follows the plan's recommended phasing: Phase 1 (T1-T2) and Phase 3 (T3-T5) can proceed in parallel, Phase 2 (T6-T7) after Phase 1, Phase 4 cleanup (T8-T10) after all migrations, final verification (T11) last.
